flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at MidAmerica Nazarene University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at MidAmerica Nazarene University are 21% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($63.0k vs $52.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at MidAmerica Nazarene University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (44.7% → 53.6%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at MidAmerica Nazarene University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (32.4% → 38.6%).
